Cylinder sizes and guide prices

Choose the right LPG cylinder for your needs.

These are guide prices for the cylinders. Cylinder prices can change frequently, so please confirm the current price, stock availability, refill status, delivery cost and accessories before payment.

Commercial / high usage

52kg Cylinder

GH₵950Guide price: GHS 950 cedis
52kg

How it looks: tall, wide and heavy-duty.

Best for high-demand cooking, commercial kitchens and customers who want fewer cylinder changes.

  • Suitable for restaurants, chop bars and busy kitchens
  • Higher LPG capacity for regular use
  • Confirm delivery and setup requirements before purchase
Confirm 52kg Price
Household favourite

14.5kg Cylinder

GH₵280Guide price: GHS 280 cedis
14.5kg

How it looks: medium-height household cylinder.

A practical size for families, regular home cooking and small food businesses.

  • Popular size for many homes
  • Balanced capacity and easier handling
  • Confirm regulator/accessory compatibility before purchase
Confirm 14.5kg Price
Small / portable

6kg Cylinder

GH₵130Guide price: GHS 130 cedis
6kg

How it looks: short, compact and easy to move.

Best for lighter cooking needs, small spaces and customers who prefer a portable option.

  • Good for small households and light use
  • Easy to store and transport
  • Confirm whether filling or delivery is included
Confirm 6kg Price

Important: LPG cylinder prices may change due to stock, supply and market conditions. Always confirm the final current price with Sandhill Oil & Gas before payment.

Why this product stands out

Not just a cylinder — a safer LPG choice.

Sandhill’s offer is strong because customers can choose from different cylinder sizes and still receive guidance on safe, responsible LPG use.

01

Right size for every user

6kg for light use, 14.5kg for regular household cooking and 52kg for high-demand or commercial use.

02

Safety-supported purchase

Customers can ask about cylinder condition, regulator needs, handling, delivery and other safety-related questions before buying.

03

Cleaner energy direction

LPG is positioned as a cleaner option compared with traditional fuels, supporting safer and more responsible energy use.

Cylinder safety

Replace the risk before it becomes a problem.

Old, damaged or unsafe cylinders should be checked early. Sandhill Oil & Gas provides cylinder management and safety support so customers can make better LPG decisions.

1
Check your cylinder
Look out for rust, dents, damaged valves or any signs that the cylinder needs attention.
2
Ask for guidance
Send Sandhill a WhatsApp message if you are unsure about the right size or safe replacement.
3
Confirm before purchase
Confirm current price, stock, refill status, delivery and accessories before making payment.
Ask About Cylinder Safety
Sandhill services

Reliable LPG solutions for homes, businesses and industries.

Sandhill provides LPG supply and related support across the customer journey, from supply to cylinder safety and technical guidance.

01

World-Class LPG Bottling

Controlled bottling processes supported by quality-control procedures for safe and efficient LPG filling.

02

Reliable LPG Supply

Structured supply and distribution support for households, businesses and industrial users.

03

Sustainable Energy Solutions

Encouraging the use of LPG as a cleaner energy option compared with traditional fuels.

04

Technical Support

Professional advisory and hands-on support to help customers use LPG safely and efficiently.

05

Cylinder Management & Safety

Guidance on proper cylinder handling, inspection, maintenance and safe usage.

06

Customer Support

Direct WhatsApp contact for enquiries on products, prices, availability and delivery.

Before you buy

Important product information.

These points help customers buy with confidence and avoid misunderstanding before payment.

?

Do prices change?

Yes. Cylinder prices can change frequently. The listed prices are guide prices and must be confirmed with Sandhill before payment.

?

Is gas included?

Please confirm whether the quoted amount is for the cylinder only, a filled cylinder, refill, delivery or accessories.

?

Which size should I choose?

Choose 6kg for light use, 14.5kg for regular home cooking and 52kg for high-demand or business use.

?

Can old cylinders be checked?

Yes. Contact Sandhill for guidance if your current cylinder is rusty, damaged or unsafe.

?

Can I ask about delivery?

Yes. Ask Sandhill directly on WhatsApp to confirm delivery availability, cost and timing.

?

Can I get safety advice?

Yes. Sandhill lists technical support and cylinder management/safety among its LPG service areas.
